title: Elemental Abilities
description: Adds six different elements with 3 custom abilities each.
body:
# ![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2167a54c9c8c76f498df9432bb7e7fae518948c.png)

**Adds 6 elements with 3 custom abilities each. On your first join, you'll be given 1 of 4 elements: **Fire, Water, Earth, or Wind. (Light and Shadow can only be obtained through the Elemental Swapper item).** Each element comes with its own unique abilities.**


# ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07a6f996bce6145a6c43fbff1939b75ed99060f.png)

### Elemental Swapper

A custom item used to reroll your element. Using this item is the only way to obtain the **Light** and **Shadow** elements.

### Elemental Essence

A custom item that when comsumed, increases your Elemental Essence level by 1. Each level unlocks 1 ability (Max 3). If a player has one or more Elemental Essence, they will drop one of their Elemental Essence on death.

### Mana Stone

A custom item that when consumed, will recover 50 mana.

### Mana Crystal

A custom item that when held, will increase your mana recovery rate by 2x

### Mana Manipulator

A custom item used to select and activate your elemental abilities

### Crystal Armor

Custom armor that increases your max mana capacity by 25 for each armor piece (equivalent to netherite)


# ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0145feb660a3bb7eb2d2c223470f059a41f90b3.png)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd7cd2236fdacc8db446d33b62ca0b59f048dc68.png)
___
* **Ability 1 - Flame Burst** — A burst of fire that explodes from your position damaging and setting on fire any entity in range.
  
* **Ability 2 - Eruption** — Molten lava starts raining from the sky damaging any entity exposed to the sky.
  
* **Ability 3 - Volcanic Cannon** — After a short charge up, fire a massive fire ball in the direction you're facing destroying, damaging, and setting on fire anything in its wake.
___
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bce457e3c9c4c3c2cb14641c905f0793b52decc8.png)
___
* **Ability 1 - Water Beam** — After a short charge up, fire an instant water beam that explodes on impact.
  
* **Ability 2 - Bubble Shield** — While actived, user gains resistance 3.
  
* **Ability 3 - Crushing Wave** — Shoot forward a huge wave dealing massive damage.
___
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e260cb82a34fe1a6f98783e52bf155c89ec1206.png)
___
* **Ability 1 - Earth Disc** — After a short charge up, shoot forward a disc of earth damaging anything hit by it and exploding after a few seconds.
  
* **Ability 2 - Earth Quake** — Small pillars followed by a massive pillar of earth raise up out of the ground launching and damaging any entity hit by it.
  
* **Ability 3 - Earth Golem** — Summon an Earth Golem to fight alongside you.
___
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/901e3993eaa0923eb2babd20476009f103645041.png)
___
* **Ability 1 - Air Dash** — Launch yourself forward/upward in the direction your're facing.
  
* **Ability 2 - Gust Needles** — After a short charge up, shoot six wind needles one at a time each targeting a nearby entity.
  
* **Ability 3 - Hurricane** — Create a massive hurricane that strikes entities inside with powerful lightning and anything caught on the edge will be torn apart by the strong winds.
___
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a877346601943e6c6aa00c5f30921f28306418b5.png)
___

The Light Element is one of the more rare elements and can only be obtained using the **Elemental Swapper** item.

* **Ability 1 - Swords Of Light** — Swords of light will periodically rain down from the sky targeting a random nearby entity.
  
* **Ability 2 - Orbital Lightning** — Summon orbital lightning where the user is looking and after a short delay a massive laser will shoot down from the sky destroying anything hit by it.
  
* **Ability 3 - Weapon Of Luminosity** — After a short delay, your held weapon will be super charged with light (Only works if you're holding either a sword, axe, or a bow) it will deal more damage and strike lightning on any entity you hit with it.
___
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fbfd376ca718c3d3c879941d8c9c53182b43724.png)
___
The Shadow Element is one of the more rare elements and can only be obtained using the **Elemental Swapper** item.
* **Ability 1 - Dark Gaze** — Summon a dark eye that will cause any nearby entity to be greatly weakened and short sighted.
  
* **Ability 2 - Hollow Shadow** — Shoot forward a small shadow that after a short delay will quickly expand into a blackhole, pulling all nearby entities and damaging them once close enough.
  
* **Ability 3 - Shadow Prison** — A massive dark sphere will surround around the user, greatly weakening and short sighting any entities caught inside.
---

---

---
# Commands

To see how much Elemental Essence you have
```
/trigger myessence
```
 To withdraw one of your Elemental Essence into your invintory
```
/trigger withdraw
```

# Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Place it into your world's `datapacks` folder
3. Reload the world or use `/reload`
